tools.Name: AgentScope
tools.Description: A production-ready, extensible multi-agent framework designed for building agentic LLM applications with support for memory, planning, and multi-agent workflows.
tools.Use_Case: Building complex multi-agent systems, realtime voice agents, and agentic workflows.

tools.Name: Heretic
tools.Description: A fully automatic tool for removing censorship/safety alignment from transformer-based language models using directional ablation.
tools.Use_Case: Decensoring language models while preserving model intelligence without expensive retraining.

tools.Name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
tools.Description: An AI-powered automation tool that generates high-definition short videos from keywords or topics, including scripts, assets, subtitles, and background music.
tools.Use_Case: Automated production of short-form video content for social media.
